title: Energy markets surge higher amid further curbs on Russian gas
section_path: Energy markets surge higher amid further curbs on Russian gas
section_path_text: Energy markets surge higher amid further curbs on Russian gas
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets were mixed as supply tightness amid a weakening economic backdrop saw large moves across metals and energy. Image reference: 1658874834186.png | assets/2022-07-27_energy-markets-surge-higher-amid-further-curbs-on-russian-gas_img_1658874834186_ceba56c79f84.png
Energy markets surged higher as Russia curbed gas supplies further. Dutch front month futures rallied more than 13% to end the session just shy of EUR200/MWh following Gazprom's announcement yesterday that gas flows through Nord Stream would be cut to 20% of capacity.
